summary: Testing completed for Actualización → Conservación flow. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend modals (Crear Predio Nuevo, Finalizar Proyecto) open and display data correctly. WebSocket gdb_upload_progress includes upload_id and municipio fields.

issues: IndexedDB timeout warnings in console - does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Created test predios nuevos during testing (will be visible in resumen-finalizacion)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Actualización → Conservación flow fully tested. Backend endpoints POST /api/actualizacion/proyectos/{id}/predios-nuevos and GET /api/actualizacion/proyectos/{id}/resumen-finalizacion working correctly. Frontend modals CrearPredioNuevoModal and FinalizarProyectoModal open and display data correctly. WebSocket gdb_upload_progress includes upload_id and municipio fields for multi-upload progress tracking.

backend_endpoints.POST_predios_nuevos: PASSED - Creates predio with codigo_predial (30 digits) and codigo_homologado (BPP format)
backend_endpoints.GET_resumen_finalizacion: PASSED - Returns correct counts for predios_nuevos, validaciones, and migracion summary
backend_endpoints.es_nuevo_flag: PASSED - Created predios have es_nuevo: true

frontend_modals.CrearPredioNuevoModal: PASSED - Opens from Visor de Actualización, shows 30-digit code with editable fields, has tabs for Ubicación/Propietarios/Construcciones/Visita
frontend_modals.FinalizarProyectoModal: PASSED - Opens from Visor, shows correct counts (Nuevos: 5, Existentes: 3225), validaciones status, migration summary, and Forzar finalización option

websocket_gdb_progress.structure: VERIFIED - gdb_upload_progress message includes upload_id and municipio fields
websocket_gdb_progress.frontend_handling: VERIFIED - allUploadsProgress state handles multiple simultaneous uploads
